detail.name_cn: 最终乐章 吹响吧！上低音号 后篇

detail.name: 피라미드 게임
detail.summary: 成秀智，一名经常转学的学生，大约在八月转入了爱之高中的2-5班。像往常一样，她亲切地和同学打招呼试图像普通学生一样结交朋友。但她却意外地成为了陌生的金字塔游戏的目标，遭遇了严重的霸凌。她努力挣扎只为摆脱被孤立的命运。

episodes.name: 전학생
episodes.desc: 전학생 성수지가 ‘행복반’이라 불리는 2학년 5반에 전학 오면서 이야기가 시작된다. 겉보기엔 모범적이고 우수한 반이지만, 묘하게 싸늘한 분위기와 서열이 존재하는 이곳. 수지는 자신만의 방식으로 조용히 적응하려 하지만, 금세 불길한 기운을 감지한다.

episodes.name: 교환
episodes.desc: 행복반의 ‘피라미드 게임’이라는 괴상한 규칙이 서서히 드러난다. 학생들 사이의 등급과 괴롭힘, 그리고 침묵. 수지는 그 잔인한 질서에서 살아남기 위한 방법을 고민한다. 한편, 모두가 눈치 보는 자은은 예상 밖의 행동을 보여준다

episodes.name: 이상과 현실
episodes.desc: 폭력과 위계가 당연시되는 교실 안. F등급이라는 낙인은 정당한 이유 없이도 누구에게나 붙는다. 수지는 그 구조 속에서 무력한 자신을 인정하면서도, 어떻게든 벗어나기 위한 전략을 세운다.

episodes.name: 무력감
episodes.desc: 학교 안팎으로 점점 더 조여오는 압박 속에서, 수지는 피라미드 게임의 중심 타깃이 되었음을 체감하게 된다. 도망치고 싶은 마음과 맞서야 한다는 다짐 사이에서 수지는 갈등한다.

episodes.name: 구원자
episodes.desc: 모든 걸 포기하려던 자은, 하지만 수지를 위해 달린다. 그리고 닫힌 문 너머에서 밝혀지는 충격적인 진실.

episodes.name: 각자의 정의
episodes.desc: 드디어 투표의 날. 수지와 자은은 이 지옥 같은 구조를 깨기 위한 마지막 시도를 한다. 그러나 예측할 수 없는 결과가 펼쳐지며, 관계는 흔들리고 믿음은 시험대에 오른다. 이 교실에서 정의란 과연 무엇일까?

episodes.name: 뾰족한 동그라미
episodes.desc: 양심과 타협하며 살아남는 법을 배운 수지. 하지만 또다시 반복되는 가학적 폭력 앞에서, 그녀는 더 이상 침묵하지 않기로 결심한다. 뾰족한 각을 잃고 둥글어진 양심 앞에서 수지는 자신의 방식으로 선을 그으려 한다.

episodes.name: 거짓말과 거짓말
episodes.desc: 자은에게 내려진 부당한 처사. 그 뒤에는 누군가의 조작과 기만이 있었다. 수지는 진실을 밝히기 위해 분투하지만, 권력과 이미지는 언제나 진실보다 강한 법. 이 반에서는 거짓말이 진실을 만들고, 또 다른 거짓말을 낳는다.

episodes.name: 서도아
episodes.desc: 도아의 과거가 밝혀진다. 아버지의 계획대로 살아온 그녀에게도 상처와 선택이 있었다. 그녀는 추구해야하는 정의에 대해 갈등하기 시작한다.

detail.name: 천방지축 하니
detail.summary: 운동에 만능인 하니가 자신이 버려진 아이였다는 사실을 알고 성격이 비뚤어지지만 양아버지 홍두깨와 체조 코치인 코뿔소 선생님의 지도로 밝은 성격을 되찾고 체조 선수로 성장해가는 과정을 그렸다.

detail.name: 追放白魔導師 ～ミニアニメ～
detail.summary:
“追放”から始まる、無自覚系無双ファンタジー、開幕！！
TVアニメ「勇者パーティーを追放された白魔導師、Sランク冒険者に拾われる ～この白魔導師が規格外すぎる～」のミニアニメの制作が決定！

detail.name: 海だ！船出だ！にこにこ、ぷん
detail.summary:
ある日、ぽろりはおかあさんから弟が生まれたという知らせを聞く。じゃじゃまるやぴっころも協力し、船で弟のいるところをめざすが、なぜか3人は海賊のすむ島に着いてしまい…。
長編アニメ映画。1990年1月4日に正月映画として制作された。『おかあさんといっしょ』内の人形劇で初めて映画化されたものである。なお、製作には日本テレビも関わっている。文部省推薦作品。

detail.name: 映画 ラブライブ！蓮ノ空女学院スクールアイドルクラブ Bloom Garden Party
detail.name_cn: 电影 LoveLive！莲之空女学院学园偶像俱乐部 Bloom Garden Party
detail.summary:
いよいよ開催される、Bloom Garden Party。
それは、花帆たちが1年をかけて追いかけてきた、
すべての人が“いつかきっと”花咲くステージ。その第一歩。

あの日、卒業生たちと誓った約束が叶う、やっと届いた夢の日。
それは、卒業を控えた103期生が、蓮ノ空の生徒として仲間と過ごせる最後の一日でもあった。

――それでも、少女たちは精一杯に”青春”を駆け抜ける。
これは、花咲こうともがき続けた少女たちの「みんなで叶える物語」。

detail.name: 狼少年ケン トーテンポールの魔人．ピストル騒動
detail.name_cn: 狼少年肯 图腾柱魔人．手枪骚乱
detail.summary:
東映動画（現・東映アニメーション）初のTVアニメで、大人気を呼んだ密林アドベンチャーロマン。その劇場版の第三弾。大地震と火山の噴火の影響で、ジャングルが火の海になる。ジャングルから動物たちが逃げ出す中、「二本足の狼」ケンはある情報を得る。それは「悪魔のガンダル」と呼ばれる、元は人間だったトーテムポールが火の中で逃げられず苦しんでいるという話だった……。やがて大火災も鎮まったある日、ジャングルに銃声が轟く。ケンを目の敵にする悪漢のゴリラが、森で拾った銃を手にいばり散らしているのだ。ケンたちは物騒なものを取り上げようと、みなで知恵を絞るが……。
　TVシリーズ第9話「トーテムポールの魔人」と第13話「ピストル騒動」の編集版。実写の時代劇映画『隠密剣士』の同時上映として、公開された。

detail.name: Miraculous Stellar Force
detail.summary: Set at an international school in the Japanese capital, "Miraculous Stellar Force" follows 12 students who discover they are guardians of the Stellar Matrix, a fractured ancient cosmic weapon. Under the leadership of Miki, Mayotte and Yu Lu, these heroes must overcome personal differences and chaotic friendships to face formidable galactic villains such as the revenge-driven Modeler and the ominous force known as The Supreme.

detail.name: LEGO®DREAMZzz Season 1：Trials of the Dream
detail.name_cn: 乐高梦境城猎人 第一季：追梦猎人的试炼
detail.summary:
Get ready to discover the world of your wildest dreams! Mateo, Izzie, Cooper, Logan and Zoey join a secret agency and learn to use the power of imagination to venture into the dream world. Making them ordinary students by day and dream chasers by night.

They soon discover that the dream world is under attack by the frightening Nightmare King and his army, and it’s up to them to save the dream realms!

Join the five friends on exciting and dreamy adventures and discover the world of your wildest dreams!

detail.name: LEGO®DREAMZzz Season 2：Night of the Never Witch
detail.name_cn: 乐高梦境城猎人 第二季：不朽女巫的阴谋
detail.summary:
New year, new dreams... and new nightmares! In Season 2 of LEGO DREAMZzz, the line between the dream and waking worlds is weaker than ever - and an ancient being known as the Never Witch is stirring up trouble. Uh, oh! Izzie, Mateo and the rest of the dream chasers will need to use every bit of their creativity, imagination and focus to try and save the day. Expect nail-biting trials. Expect edge-of-your-seat adventure. Expect a ridiculously epic second season!

Ready to journey back into the world of your wildest dreams? The Night Bureaus around the world have never been busier. Little do they know what lies ahead. Something sinister is brewing and it makes the Nightmare King look sweeter than the Candy Realm… Grab your hourglasses – the world needs dream chasers more than ever!

detail.name: LEGO®DREAMZzz Season 3：Enter The Cyber Game
detail.name_cn: 乐高梦境城猎人 第三季：进入二次元游戏
detail.summary: The dream world has finally returned to a place of peace and beauty…but maybe it’s a little too quiet without any troublemakers causing mischief. Suddenly a few rogue nightmare creatures emerge, threatening the tranquility. It's time to get ready for a new adventure and restore the dream world back in order! Who knows what will await us on the journey this time... ?

detail.name: #bbvday2022
detail.summary: An audiovisual collage of handmade valentines from a pandemic year of book collecting.

In his film #43, Joost Rekveld observes what happens to a system that is destabilised by ‘creative’ pixels, drawing inspiration from the set of ideas in biology and mathematics that arose during the development of cybernetics in the 1950s.

detail.name: Permutations
detail.summary: An experimental short film by John Whitney Sr. which combines animated shapes and colors; Computer graphics as dynamic, swirling art. Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in 2014.

detail.name: Matrix I
detail.summary: A piece of abstract cinema by John Whitney. A series squares follow a 3-dimensional track, each one with a slight delay after the other.

detail.name: Matrix III
detail.summary: An abstract computer-generated animation set to music by Terry Riley.

detail.name: Arabesque
detail.summary: John Whitney’s pioneering work of computer animation, Arabesque, from 1975. This flowing, abstract short film is a wonder to behold, a work of art. Like many other computer graphics pioneers, this film suggests roots in psychedelics and spiritual quests as much as engineering and mathematics. Preserved by the Academy Film Archive in 2007.

detail.name: Ninjago - Dream Team
detail.summary:
When the Ninja find a young boy, Jan, under attack by strange shadow creatures, they leap into action. But their fighting skills prove useless against their new enemies' powers and Jan is captured.

Just as hope begins to fade, the dream chasers arrive to help. Together, they turn the tide, only to discover they're actually in Jan's dream. Now, united with the dream chasers, the Ninja must free Jan and the dream world from the sinister Nightmare King.

detail.name: Will you enter the Dream World?
detail.summary: Will you enter the Dream World? (also referred to as I Just Had the Dream or Something is coming) is a promotional concept for a LEGO theme called LEGO DREAMZzz using the world of Ninjago. It was animated by Pure Imagination Studios, instead of WildBrain.

I Just Had the Most Outrageous Dream

detail.name_cn: 变形金刚:地球火种 第二季
detail.summary: One year after Mandroid's defeat and the Emberstone's shattering, the Maltos go on a search for the shards. When a Decepticon creates a new foe from a broken shard, the Maltos realize life in Witwicky is about to be chaotic.

detail.name: Transformers: Earthspark Season 3
detail.name_cn: 变形金刚:地球火种 第三季
detail.summary: Bumblebee and Breakdown fire fruitlessly at the Chaos Dome enclosing Terratronus, but are unable to breach it. Bumblebee regrets that he can't free his friend — getting Robby and Mo to bring down the dome would free all of the Decepticons after all. Promising to try again tomorrow, Bee drives off.

detail.name: ghost（仮題）
detail.summary: 誰しもの心の中にいる“ゴースト”。それは、言葉にならない、でもちゃんとここにある本物の気持ちのことを表す。「ghost（仮題）」では、星空を守るために世界の不条理に反抗する少女・ニケの孤独と勇敢さ、他者との関わりによる心の機微を叙情的に描き出していく。同作について夏目監督は、「虚構とも言えるアニメーションで、今の時代性を汲んだ、リアリティを追求した作品を目指したい」と意気込みを語っている。

detail.name: 鬼の花嫁
detail.summary:
人間と“あやかし”が共生する日本──。
優れた能力と容姿を持つ“あやかし”は
日本の中核を担っていた。
そんな絶大な権力を持つ“あやかし”は
本能で運命の「花嫁」を
見つけることができ、その「花嫁」に
選ばれることは女性の憧れであり、
名誉なことだった。
平凡な高校生・東雲柚子は、
妖狐の花嫁である妹・花梨と比較され、
家族にないがしろにされながら
育ってきた。
「見つけた、俺の花嫁」彼の名は鬼龍院玲夜、
“あやかし”の頂点に立つ鬼だった。
──この出会いから、
柚子の運命が大きく動きだす。
